query:
SELECT u.name, u.email, dsl.digest_type, dsl.status, dsl.sent_date, dsl.week_key
FROM digestScheduleLog dsl
JOIN users u ON u.id = dsl.user_id
WHERE dsl.digest_type = 'thursday'
ORDER BY dsl.sent_date DESC
LIMIT 20;
